column.name: description
column.value: Process payments and run cashier shifts

column.name: description
column.value: Create and adjust sessions and bookings

column.name: description
column.value: Skip therapists, insert backups, reorder lineup

column.name: description
column.value: Edit organization logo and color scheme

changeSet.author: sumicare
sumicare
sumicare
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO shift_assignments (shift_id, therapist_id, effective_date) SELECT s.id, t.id, CURRENT_DATE FROM shifts s, therapists t WHERE s.organization_id = t.organization_id AND s.label = 'Shift 1' AND t.staff_number = 'TH001'; INSERT INTO shift_assignments (shift_id, therapist_id, effective_date) SELECT s.id, t.id, CURRENT_DATE FROM shifts s, therapists t WHERE s.organization_id = t.organization_id AND s.label = 'Shift 2' AND t.staff_number = 'TH002'; INSERT INTO shift_assignments (shift_id, therapist_id, effective_date) SELECT s.id, t.id, CURRENT_DATE FROM shifts s, therapists t WHERE s.organization_id = t.organization_id AND s.label = 'Shift 3' AND t.staff_number = 'TH003'; INSERT INTO shift_assignments (shift_id, therapist_id, effective_date) SELECT s.id, t.id, CURRENT_DATE FROM shifts s, therapists t WHERE s.organization_id = t.organization_id AND s.label = 'Shift 4' AND t.staff_number = 'TH004'; INSERT INTO shift_assignments (shift_id, therapist_id, effective_date) SELECT s.id, t.id, CURRENT_DATE FROM shifts s, therapists t WHERE s.organization_id = t.organization_id AND s.label = 'Shift 5' AND t.staff_number = 'TH005';

changeSet.author: sumicare
sumicare

column.name: prompt
column.value: Which area would you like focused?

changeSet.author: sumicare
